product.name: Portable LED Lamp
selling_points: Soft, warm light for desk, bedside, or travel use.

creative_strategy.core_pain: Big, plug-bound lamps are awkward for tight desks and travel, and harsh light feels uncomfortable at night.
creative_strategy.promise: A compact LED lamp you can carry anywhere that gives a soft, warm glow for desk, bedside, or on-the-go use.

creative_design.selected_category_reason: Product Detail best highlights tactile size and surface finish while simply showing the warm light. It fits a single-shot, close-up treatment and avoids relying on precise button presses or tiny indicators.

candidate_categories.reason: Close, tactile inspection of the lamp and a clear warm light-up moment sell compactness and cozy light quality.
candidate_categories.risk: Animating the light turning on must be gentle and readable without showing a specific button.

candidate_categories.reason: A simple turn-on action demonstrates the warm light instantly.
candidate_categories.risk: Depends on a visible state change; avoid precise finger-to-button contact.

candidate_categories.reason: Context at a desk or bedside reinforces use cases.
candidate_categories.risk: Adds set complexity and risks distracting details for a short, single-shot execution.

creative_design.selling_angle: Take warm, comfortable light anywhere in a compact form.
creative_design.visual_grammar: Product hero close-up; single hand interaction; gentle push-in; end on a steady glowing hold.
creative_design.proof_mechanism: Physical scale shown by hand pick-up and proximity to a small travel pouch; warm light visibly pooling on the desk surface.
creative_design.hook_or_opening: A quiet close-up of the real lamp on a clean wood desk beside a small canvas travel pouch in soft daylight.
creative_design.action_arc: From the static desk scene, a hand enters, lifts and slowly rotates the lamp to show its compact size, sets it back down near the pouch; the lamp softly illuminates, casting a warm pool of light; the camera eases in and holds.
creative_design.payoff: A steady, cozy warm glow around the lamp on the desk, clearly compact next to the pouch.
creative_design.feasibility_notes: One scene, one prop (pouch), one hand. No precise button press shown—only a gentle light-up. No logos or tiny text. Minimal camera movement and simple warm lighting change to keep stability.

character.appearance: One adult with medium skin tone; only right hand and forearm appear.
character.hair_makeup: Not visible; if glimpsed at the edge of frame, neat and natural.
character.performance_style: Slow, gentle, deliberate movements; no sudden gestures.

scene.location: Tidy light-wood desk surface against a soft off-white wall.
scene.lighting: Soft ambient daylight; when the lamp turns on, a warm amber glow adds on the desk surface.
scene.background: Plain off-white wall with subtle soft shadow; no additional decor.
key_props: Small beige canvas travel pouch with a simple zipper

product.visual_identity: The compact portable LED lamp from the reference image: minimal, modern design with a matte neutral finish and a diffused emitter that produces a warm glow. Keep its proportions and color consistent with the reference.
product.proof_prop: Small beige canvas travel pouch for scale and travel context.

single_shot.visual_prompt: Begin from a calm, static scene: the real portable LED lamp from the provided reference image sits centered on a clean, light wood desk. To its left is a small beige canvas travel pouch with a simple zipper, resting flat. Behind them is a soft off-white wall in gentle daylight. No hand or person is visible in this first moment. After a brief beat, a single adult right hand in a neutral oatmeal knit sleeve enters from the right. The hand gently grasps the lamp, lifts it and slowly rotates it once, showing its compact, palmable size above the desk. The hand then sets the lamp back down near the pouch. As soon as it rests on the desk, the lamp softly illuminates, casting a warm amber pool of light across the wood surface and lightly touching the pouch. The hand withdraws. The camera makes a subtle, slow push-in toward the glowing lamp and pouch, holding on the cozy, warm light for a calm finish. Keep the desk, pouch, and wall consistent throughout, with no additional objects introduced.
single_shot.start_frame_prompt: Create the first full-scene frame using the exact portable LED lamp from the provided product reference image, placed naturally in an environment. The lamp sits centered on a clean, light wood desk surface. To its left sits a small beige canvas travel pouch with a simple zipper, resting flat and closed. The background is a plain off-white wall in soft, even daylight. The scene is minimal and tidy with no other objects and no on-screen text. No hand or person is visible in this first frame.
single_shot.text: Compact carry. Soft warm glow. Desk • Bedside • Travel.
single_shot.audio: Soft, warm ambient music bed; a subtle, pleasant chime or swell as the lamp lights up; no voiceover.
